page.$description: Page background — the outermost container surface.

default.$description: Default neutral surface — primary content background.

subtle.$description: Subtle elevation — slight differentiation from the page surface.

muted.$description: Muted surface — for inactive or secondary regions.

elevated.$description: Elevated surface for cards and popovers; pair with shadow.sm or shadow.md.

inverse.$description: Inverse or dark surface for inverted-theme content.

overlay.$description: Modal scrim — gray.900 at 50% alpha, hardcoded pending alias-plus-alpha transform (see PLAN.md §8).
